severity_levels.critical: hallucinated sensor; wrong keypad layout; geometry that misleads at unboxing or first install
severity_levels.high: missing mechanical key; misplaced fingerprint zone; incorrect handle direction
severity_levels.medium: wrong camera position; fake emergency port; wrong indicator placement
severity_levels.low: non-critical visibility issues that do not affect identification or operation

mitigation_template: ComfyUI workflow MUST anchor the listed trigger_components against the OEM PNG references and refuse to render the asset if anchors are missing.
